prospects.personalized_line: Your mortgage and homebuying guides are some of the most comprehensive I've seen for first-time buyers.
prospects.value_prop: Our free embeddable affordability widget would give your readers an instant, interactive answer to 'how much house can I afford?' — complementing your excellent written guides with a practical tool.
prospects.asset_offered: Mortgage Affordability Calculator Widget (free, no-signup, iframe embed)

prospects.personalized_line: I've been following your writing on financial independence and housing decisions — your '30/30/3 rule' for home buying is a great framework.
prospects.value_prop: Our mortgage affordability widget helps readers apply frameworks like yours with real numbers — instantly showing what they can afford based on income, debts, and location.
prospects.asset_offered: Mortgage Affordability Calculator Widget (free, no-signup, iframe embed)

prospects.personalized_line: Your mortgage calculator is one of the most-used tools online — we've built a complementary affordability widget that adds a 'how much can I afford' layer.
prospects.value_prop: While users calculate specific mortgage payments on your site, our widget helps them determine the right price range upfront. The two tools work together perfectly.
prospects.asset_offered: Mortgage Affordability Calculator Widget (free, no-signup, iframe embed)

prospects.personalized_line: Your coverage of mortgage industry trends is essential reading — we'd love to offer your audience a practical tool that complements your analysis.
prospects.value_prop: For mortgage professionals reading HousingWire, our widget provides a reliable, accurate affordability calculator they can reference or embed in client-facing content.
prospects.decision: NEEDS_REVISION — Score <90. Need more B2B angle for mortgage professional audience.

prospects.personalized_line: Credit Karma's mortgage marketplace helps millions find the right loan — our widget could add an affordability-first step to that journey.

rule: Do NOT send until Auditor gives final approval. Only >=90 can be sent.
